reasoning: The ISO27001 A.12.6 control focuses on technical vulnerability management, which includes ensuring that systems are not exposed to unnecessary risks. In Kubernetes, this can be addressed by implementing NetworkPolicies to restrict ingress and egress traffic, ensuring RBAC is configured to prevent over-privileged access, and enforcing pod security contexts to prevent running containers as root. These measures help mitigate vulnerabilities by reducing the attack surface and enforcing least privilege.
title: Technical Vulnerability Management
